stemHtml: You have been contracted by the government to carry a cargo consisting solely of medical supplies and personnel to a conflict area. To ensure priority, what message should you pass when in contact with an ATS unit?

options.a: You are only entitled to priority if you are a registered ambulance aircraft, and as such it is sufficient to state the appropriate call sign.
options.b: After the prefix PAN PAN three times, state your call sign, the fact you are carrying medical supplies and personnel, the pilot`s intentions, current position, and heading.
options.c: After the prefix PAN PAN three times, followed by the word “MEDICAL”, state your call sign, your position, type, intended route, estimated time of arrival at destination, and current altitude.
options.d: After your call sign, current position, level, heading, frequencies guarded and secondary surveillance radar modes and codes, close the transmission with the words “PAN MEDICAL”.
